interpretation_boundary: No transparency receipt or inclusion proof should be implied when the envelope has not been logged.
paper_use: Reviewer-safe status legend for publication receipts

interpretation_boundary: A receipt locator/hash may exist before any inclusion proof is verified; this remains publication-trace evidence only, not substantive validation.
paper_use: Appendix row distinguishing placeholder or pending-log states from verified proof

interpretation_boundary: Verified inclusion proves publication-trace integrity only; it does not prove truth, legality, compliance, or safety.
paper_use: Methods note on SCITT-style publication witnesses

interpretation_boundary: Draft VC wiring is a packaging plan only unless an actually issued credential is evidenced and separately verified.
Issued status means a credential object exists; it still must stay bounded to observation/process claims and not be read as certification or factual validation.

should_remain_empty: signing_scheme; signer_hint; signature_ref; key_material_ref; trust_anchor_ref; verification_notes
interpretation_boundary: Unsigned envelopes should not carry signature-like handles that a reviewer could mistake for a completed cryptographic event.
Placeholder signature wiring shows future release-hardening shape only; it must not be read as a generated or verified signature.
An emitted signature without verification remains an integrity candidate, not a verified trust result.
Verified signatures speak only to bounded integrity and signer-binding claims declared by the envelope profile, not to underlying allegation truth or legal validity.
